mnemonics: Satoshi's 2008 Paper Birthed Bitcoin (Think: '2008' for the year and 'Bitcoin' as the first application)
Blockchain Evolved in Three Stages: Currency, Contracts, Applications (Use the 'C-C-A' pattern to remember the progression)
Proof-of-Work is the Original Consensus (Remember 'POW' like the power it took to create it)
keyPoints: The concept was introduced in 2008 by Satoshi Nakamoto as the public ledger for Bitcoin cryptocurrency.
Blockchain technology has evolved beyond cryptocurrency into smart contracts and decentralized applications (dApps).
The original and most famous consensus mechanism is Proof-of-Work, which secures the network through mining.
commonMistakes: Believing blockchain and Bitcoin are the same thing (Blockchain is the technology; Bitcoin is one application of it).
Assuming blockchain history begins with financial use cases only (the whitepaper envisioned smart contracts).
